calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-10-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Visiting Judge: Cecilia Castellanos , Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff BALAHI RAMAMURTHY is present.
Attorney Kevin R. Elliot for the plaintiff.
Defendant InfoWave Systems is present. Represented by Ravi Ovee.
Attorney Earth Shah for defendant.
Defendant SPSJ Solutions, Inc. is present. Represented by Paul Wong.
Attorney Jeremy S. Millstone for defendant.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. Payment to be made from InfoWave to Plaintiff. The Court retains jurisdiction pursuant to CCP 664.6. The trial date of February 5, 2018 is vacated. Counsels to file dismissals by April 10, 2018. (501)
